project.title: The Universal Language: Annotating Political Messaging during Super Bowl Halftime Shows
project.description: This project annotates certain moments within the Super Bowl LIX and LX halftime shows that demonstrate political messaging through performance and musicality. The aim of this site is to build a basic understanding of the importance of political messaging in performance art produced and consumed on major national stages and develop literacy in media, art, information, and culture.
project.creator: kmpartlow
